docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROCKHAUS, MARC AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, JASON SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, JASON

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-10-2018 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF MARC BROCKHAUS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $43.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROCKHAUS, MARC
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROCKHAUS, MARC HEARING SET FOR OCT-10-2018 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
RENT DEPOSIT DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT POWELL, JASON
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $303.31 RE 35627 FOR TRANSACTION R4918B06R017 (RENT DEPOSIT), PAYABLE TO MARC BROCKHAUS, WARRANT #38205644, DATED JAN-02-2019

ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF BROCKHAUS, MARC
RENT DEPOSIT, TRAN # W1718A30R001, TAG # 035612 DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT POWELL, JASON

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-31-2018 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JASON POWELL'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/TLJ)
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT POWELL, JASON
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, JASON
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROCKHAUS, MARC SERVED SEP-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, JASON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROCKHAUS, MARC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POWELL, JASON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 402 MADRID ST (1ST BEDROOM ON THE RIGHT), SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, JASON

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-31-2018 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JASON POWELL'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/TLJ
